## Summary

## Security boundary

proposal / policy / identity / approval / execution / data flow / telemetry / control plane / documentation

## Required evidence

- [ ] Tests cover positive, negative, boundary, and bypass behavior as applicable.
- [ ] Public API is documented with examples.
- [ ] Threat model/control register updated if authority or data flow changed.
- [ ] Telemetry/audit behavior is defined.
- [ ] `make check` passes.
- [ ] No real secrets or production data are present.
